title: SCP-458, The never ending Pizza Box
description: A pizza box that never runs out—unless you forget to close it.
body:
The never ending Pizza Box adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-458, also known as The never ending Pizza Box .


SCP-458 is an anomalous Pizza Box capable of refilling itself with fresh pizza slices every time it is opened. It naturally generates in containment chambers and serves as an infinite food source. The Pizza Slices itself aren't anomalous.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-458 spawn?

SCP-458 spawns in a containment chamber, usually underground in forests There may be multiple SCP-458s.

</details>



![SCP-458](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d2290098fc763fbcbf7dc5553c3c4add3b6b144.png)

SCP-458 appears as a normal cardboard pizza box found inside a containment chamber. When opened, it reveals a large pizza. If a player right clicks the Pizza, they will gain one Pizza Slice which can be eaten. The pizza itself contains 8 slices and if all slices are taken, the box becomes temporarily empty and no new slices will generate until it is fully closed by right clicking and sneaking and opened again, at which point the pizza instantly refills.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
